tasks.description: Deploy complexity validator CTO-20260305-001 to production
tasks.context: Deploy backend/src/utils/task-complexity-validator.ts (approved 5 days ago, never deployed). SSH to server, ensure file is present, restart backend service, verify validator is active in logs. This prevents oversized tasks from blocking execution.

tasks.description: Verify orchestrator processes tasks after rejection
tasks.context: Create synthetic sprint with 3 tasks: 1 invalid (will be rejected), 2 valid. Submit to orchestrator, verify it processes all 3 (not stopping after rejection). Log results confirming queue continues. Target file for test script: backend/tests/orchestrator-resilience.test.ts (create new).

tasks.description: Test complexity validator rejects oversized tasks
tasks.context: Submit task with >600 char context to backend/src/utils/task-complexity-validator.ts, verify rejection with clear error message. Submit task with <600 chars, verify approval. Create test file backend/tests/complexity-validator.test.ts to ensure validator is functioning.

Add /health/orchestrator endpoint to backend/src/api/health.ts that reports: queue length, last task processed timestamp, rejection count last hour, validator status. Returns 200 if healthy, 503 if stalled >5min. Enables monitoring of execution pipeline.

Investigate why git-autodeploy failed to deploy CTO-20260305-ORCH and CTO-20260305-001. Check webhook signature verification in backend/src/middleware/webhook-verify.ts, ensure GitHub webhook secret is configured correctly. Fix any auth issues preventing auto-deployment.
